calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-06-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-22-2016 Continued To Jun-22-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-05-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514; Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Mitch L. Lyon, #6840; Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq. appeared for plaintiff National Collegiate Student Loan Trust 2006-2, A Delaware Statutory Trust(s).
No appearance by defendant Julius Castameda, a/k/a Julius C. Castaneda.
Default was entered against defendant on April 26, 2016.
Dismissal without prejudice of the DOE defendants was filed with the Clerk's Office on April 26, 2016.
Order granting plaintiff's request for waiver of witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on May 4, 2016.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff National Collegiate Student Loan Trust 2006-2, A Delaware Statutory Trust(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant Julius Castameda, a/k/a Julius C. Castaneda, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $53,366.63.
Costs - $719.15, for a total judgment in the amount of $54,085.78.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-28-2015 Continued To May-11-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
